testimonials.title: Zara Ahmed
testimonials.content: I had no coding background at all. Six months after finishing the course I landed my first developer role. The curriculum is practical, the projects are real, and the support is outstanding.

testimonials.title: Finn Larsen
testimonials.content: Every lesson builds logically on the last. The instructor explains concepts clearly, answers questions quickly and the community keeps you accountable. Worth every penny.

meta.headline: Best investment I've made in my career

testimonials.title: Leila Nazari
testimonials.content: I had tried other platforms but always dropped off. Here the pacing is perfect, the projects are relevant to the industry, and I actually finished. I have already recommended it to three colleagues.

meta.headline: Finally a course I actually finished

testimonials.title: Omar Hassan
testimonials.content: We enrolled twelve members of our marketing team and saw measurable results within the first month. The business track is exactly what corporate learners need — no filler, all substance.

meta.headline: Upskilled our entire team in weeks

testimonials.title: Nina Kowalski
testimonials.content: I landed my first freelance client halfway through the course. The portfolio projects gave me real work to show, and the freelancing module helped me price and pitch with confidence.

meta.headline: Got my first client before I even finished

testimonials.title: Victor Santos
testimonials.content: We used this as part of our new-hire onboarding and it has saved us weeks of internal training time. The content is up to date, well structured and our team genuinely enjoys it.

meta.headline: Transformed the way we onboard talent
